ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
This is a repo with links to everything you'd ever want to learn about data engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
Language: jupyter-notebook
Learn how to develop, deploy and iterate on production-grade ML applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository showcases various advanced techniques for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Each technique has a detailed notebook tutorial.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/agents-towards-production
Language: jupyter-notebook
End-to-end, code-first tutorials for building production-grade GenAI agents. From prototype to enterprise deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PacktPublishing/30-Agents-Every-AI-Engineer-Must-Build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PacktPublishing/30-Agents-Every-AI-Engineer-Must-Build
Language: jupyter-notebook
30 Agents Every AI Engineer Must Build, published by Packt

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezadir/Machine-Learning-Interviews
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezadir/Machine-Learning-Interviews
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repo is meant to serve as a guide for Machine Learning/AI technical interviews.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/iq-series
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/iq-series
Language: jupyter-notebook
The IQ Series is a hands-on learning experience for Microsoft IQ: Microsoft's unified intelligence layer for the enterprise, spanning Foundry IQ, Work IQ, and Fabric IQ. The series includes video episodes, Jupyter notebooks, and Azure deployment templates.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp-for-beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/openai-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oracle-devrel/oracle-ai-developer-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
Technical resources for AI developers to build applications, agents, and systems using Oracle AI Database and OCI services

ns0:entry.ns0:title: udlbook/udlbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/udlbook/udlbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Understanding Deep Learning - Simon J.D. Prince

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wesm/pydata-book
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wesm/pydata-book
Language: jupyter-notebook
Materials and IPython notebooks for "Python for Data Analysis" by Wes McKinney, published by O'Reilly Media
